Hero.title: All your PDF tools in one place
Hero.subtitle: All the tools you need to use PDFs, right at your fingertips. All are 100% FREE, secure and easy to use.

Home.security_desc: Your files never leave your device. All processing is done locally in your browser.
Home.speed_desc: With no server uploads, processing is instantaneous and doesn't depend on your internet connection.
Home.no_signup_desc: Start immediately. No need to create an account or provide your email to use the tools.

Cookies.message: We use cookies to enhance your experience and show relevant ads. By clicking "Accept", you consent to the use of cookies in accordance with our

About.mission_p1: At iLoveDoc, we believe everyone deserves free and easy access to professional PDF tools. Our mission is to make PDF document management simple, fast, and secure — without registration, hidden fees, and most importantly, without ever compromising your file privacy.
About.mission_p2: Every document you process stays on your device. No file is sent to a remote server. This is our fundamental commitment.
About.why_1_desc: All our tools are completely free, with no file limits or added watermarks. No hidden premium plans.
About.why_2_desc: Your files never leave your browser. Processing is done entirely on the client-side using modern technologies.
About.why_3_desc: No network sending, no server waiting. Your documents are processed instantly on your machine.
About.why_4_desc: No account required. Access all tools immediately without sharing your personal information.
About.exp_1_desc: iLoveDoc is developed by a team of passionate software engineers, specialized in modern web technologies (React, Next.js, TypeScript) and digital document processing.
About.exp_2_desc: We follow industry best practices: accessibility (WCAG), performance (Core Web Vitals), SEO, and security (CSP, HTTPS).
About.exp_3_desc: Our code relies on recognized open-source libraries like pdf-lib. We value transparency and trust.
About.tech_desc: Unlike other online services, iLoveDoc performs all operations directly in your browser. Your files never transit the internet, guaranteeing total privacy and maximum speed.
About.tech_note: No server involved — everything stays with you.
About.cta_desc: Try our PDF tools for free — no registration required.

Privacy.intro_p1: Welcome to iLoveDoc (hereinafter referred to as "the Site"), accessible at https://ilovedoc.com. Protecting your personal data is a priority for us. This privacy policy describes what information we collect, how we use it, and your rights.
Privacy.intro_p2: By using the Site, you accept the practices described in this policy. If you do not accept these conditions, please do not use the Site.
Privacy.data_nav_desc: When you visit the Site, we may automatically collect certain technical information via cookies and similar technologies:
Privacy.data_nav_list:
• IP Address (anonymized)
  • Browser type and version
  • Operating System
  • Visited pages and consultation time
  • Traffic source (referrer)
  • Screen resolution and browser language
Privacy.data_form_desc: If you use our contact form, we collect the information you voluntarily provide: name, email address, subject, and message content. This data is used exclusively to respond to your inquiry.
Privacy.data_pdf_desc: iLoveDoc does not collect, store, or transfer any PDF files. All document processing (merging, compression, conversion, etc.) is performed entirely within your browser, client-side, using the pdf-lib library. No files are sent to our servers or third-party servers.
Privacy.cookies_desc: The Site uses different types of cookies:
Privacy.cookies_ess_desc: These cookies are necessary for the Site's operation (e.g., display preferences, dark mode). They do not collect identifiable personal data.
Privacy.cookies_ana_desc: We use Google Analytics to understand how visitors interact with the Site. Google Analytics uses cookies to collect information anonymously (visited pages, session duration, etc.). This data helps us improve the user experience.
Privacy.cookies_ana_link: To learn more about how Google uses data: https://policies.google.com/technologies/partner-sites
Privacy.cookies_ads_p1: The Site displays ads via the Google AdSense program. In this context:
Privacy.cookies_ads_p2: Google, as a third-party vendor, uses cookies to serve ads on the Site. Google's use of the DART cookie enables it and its partners to serve ads based on your visit to the Site and/or other sites on the Internet.
Privacy.cookies_ads_p3: Third-party vendors, including Google, use cookies to serve ads based on your prior visits to the Site or other sites.
Privacy.cookies_ads_p4: Google's use of advertising cookies enables it and its partners to serve ads to your users based on their visit to your site and/or other sites on the Internet.
Privacy.cookies_opt_desc: You can manage your cookie preferences in several ways:
Privacy.cookies_opt_list:
• Browser settings: Most browsers allow you to refuse or delete cookies via their privacy settings.
  • Google Ads opt-out: You can opt-out of personalized advertising by visiting the Google Ads Settings.
  • General opt-out: You can opt-out of third-party advertising cookies by visiting www.aboutads.info/choices/ or www.youronlinechoices.eu/.
  • NAI opt-out: Visit the Network Advertising Initiative to opt-out of participating advertising network cookies.
Privacy.cookies_opt_note: Please note that disabling cookies may affect certain Site features.
Privacy.adsense_desc: iLoveDoc displays ads via the Google AdSense program. In this context:
Privacy.adsense_list:
• Third-party vendors, including Google, use cookies to serve ads based on your prior visits to the Site or other sites.
  • Google uses the DoubleClick cookie to enable it and its partners to serve ads based on your visit to the Site and/or other sites on the Internet.
  • Users can opt-out of the use of the DART cookie by visiting the Google ad settings.
Privacy.adsense_note: For more information on how Google manages data in its advertising products, see the Google Privacy Policy.
Privacy.rgpd_desc: In accordance with the General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR) and the Data Protection Act, you have the following rights regarding your personal data:
Privacy.rgpd_list:
• Right of access: You can obtain confirmation that data concerning you is or is not being processed and, when it is, access to this data.
  • Right to rectification: You can obtain the rectification of inaccurate or incomplete data.
  • Right to erasure: You can obtain the erasure of your data in the cases provided for by the regulation.
  • Right to restriction of processing: You can request the restriction of the processing of your data under certain circumstances.
  • Right to data portability: You can receive your data in a structured, commonly used, and machine-readable format.
  • Right to object: You can object to the processing of your data for legitimate reasons.
Privacy.rgpd_contact: To exercise these rights, contact us at: nexuslogic.pro@gmail.com. We will respond to your request within 30 days.
Privacy.rgpd_cnil: You also have the right to file a complaint with the French National Commission for Information Technology and Civil Liberties (CNIL).
Privacy.retention_desc: The collected data is retained for the duration necessary for the purpose for which it was collected:
Privacy.retention_list:
• Navigation data (analytics): Retained for a maximum of 26 months, in accordance with CNIL recommendations.
  • Contact data: Retained for 3 years from the last contact.
  • Cookies: The lifespan of cookies does not exceed 13 months, in accordance with applicable regulations.
  • PDF files: No retention — files never leave your browser.
Privacy.modifications_p1: We reserve the right to modify this privacy policy at any time. Any changes will be published on this page with a revised update date. We encourage you to regularly check this page to stay informed of our data protection practices.
Privacy.modifications_p2: In the event of substantial changes, we will display a visible notice on the Site to inform you.
Privacy.contact_desc: For any questions regarding this privacy policy or to exercise your rights, you can contact us:

Faq.item0_q: Do you keep a copy of my files once processed?
Faq.item0_a: Absolutely not. iLoveDoc performs all processing directly in your browser (client-side). Your files never leave your device and are never sent to a remote server. They remain 100% under your control and secure.
Faq.item1_q: Are business files secure with your service?
Faq.item1_a: Yes. Since processing is done locally in your own browser, no third party (including ourselves) can access your business documents. This is the ideal solution for respecting RGPD and strict business confidentiality.
Faq.item2_q: What is the minimum system configuration?
Faq.item2_a: A modern browser (Chrome, Firefox, Safari or Edge) with an internet connection. As calculations are performed locally by your device, sufficient RAM is recommended for very large documents.
Faq.item3_q: How can I download my files?
Faq.item3_a: Once the document processing operation is complete, a download button appears to save the generated file directly to your device.
Faq.item4_q: Can I convert my scanned PDFs into editable documents?
Faq.item4_a: Yes. Our OCR (Optical Character Recognition) and editing tools extract text from your scanned PDFs to make it selectable and editable directly.
Faq.item5_q: Why is my conversion taking so long?
Faq.item5_a: The speed depends mainly on the processing power of your device and the file size, as processing is done locally on your computer without relying on external servers.

Contact.faq_item4_a: Use the contact form above with the subject 'Bug / Technical issue' and describe the problem encountered.

signatures-numeriques-legales.title: The Validity of Digital Signatures Explained: What Makes Them Legally Binding?
signatures-numeriques-legales.subtitle: Understanding the Legal Framework and Juridical Value of an Online Document Signature.
signatures-numeriques-legales.description: Discover what makes a digital signature legally binding, how laws vary by country, and how to protect your online documents.

content.0: In the era of remote work and process digitization, signing a document online has become a daily gesture. But what about the legal value of these signatures? Are they equivalent to a handwritten signature? The short answer is yes, provided certain rules are respected.
content.2: A digital signature (or electronic signature) is not just a scan of your handwritten signature. It is a cryptographic process that links the signer's identity to the document in an unfalsifiable way. This guarantees two crucial elements: authenticity (who signed) and integrity (the document has not been modified since its signature).
content.3: The Legal Framework in Europe and Worldwide
content.4: In the European Union, it is the eIDAS regulation that governs electronic signatures. It defines three levels of signature:
content.6: Why Use iLoveDoc for Your Documents?
content.7: iLoveDoc allows you to add signatures to your documents directly in your browser. Since no files are uploaded to our servers, your information remains entirely confidential. It's the perfect tool for your daily quick, secure, and web-compliant signatures.
content.8: In conclusion, signing digitally is not only legal, but it's also much safer than a handwritten paper signature if you use the right tools. Adopt electronic signatures today!
content.5_item0: The simple signature (e.g., checking a box or inserting an image of your signature). It is legal but its probative value is limited.
content.5_item1: The advanced signature, which requires stricter identification criteria and a secure link with the signer.
content.5_item2: The qualified signature (QES), which is legally equivalent to 100% of a handwritten signature and uses a verified identity certificate.

fusionner-pdf-et-jpg.title: How to Merge PDF and JPG Files into a Single Document (Easily)
fusionner-pdf-et-jpg.subtitle: Combine PDF files and images into one document — quickly, easily, and without downloading.
fusionner-pdf-et-jpg.description: Discover how to merge PDF and JPG files into a single document with iLoveDoc. Quickly, easily, and directly from your browser.

content.0: Need to merge a PDF file and a JPG image? Whether you're preparing a report, submitting administrative documents, or simply want to group everything into one file, we'll explain it all.
content.1: Merging different types of files may seem complicated, but it's actually very simple. In this guide, we'll explain how to do it with iLoveDoc — without downloading and in a very simple way.
content.2: Step 1: Convert Your JPG Images to PDF
content.3: Before merging, the simplest thing to do is convert your JPG images to PDF format. On iLoveDoc, go to the 'JPG to PDF' tool. Drop your images, adjust the orientation or margin if necessary, and click Convert. You'll get a PDF file containing your images.
content.5: Once your image is converted to PDF, go to the 'Merge PDF' tool. Import your original document and the new PDF containing the image. You can reorder the files by simple drag-and-drop. Click 'Merge PDF' to download the combined final file.
content.6: And that's it! In two quick steps, entirely done in your browser without risk to your data, you've merged your files professionally.

modifier-pdf-sans-adobe.title: Can I edit a PDF without Adobe Acrobat? Here's how to do it with iLoveDoc
modifier-pdf-sans-adobe.subtitle: The online and 100% free solution to edit your texts and annotations without an expensive license.
modifier-pdf-sans-adobe.description: You need to edit a PDF but you don't have Adobe Acrobat? Here's how to use iLoveDoc for free, without downloading or technical skills.

content.0: Adobe Acrobat is the historical reference for PDF editing, but its monthly subscription cost can be prohibitive for occasional needs. Fortunately, there are modern and free alternatives.
content.1: Why is the PDF format difficult to edit?
content.2: The PDF was designed as a fixed digital print format. Unlike a Word document, it does not contain a fluid text flow structure, but rather fixed coordinates for each character. This is why PDF editing requires specialized tools.
content.4: With iLoveDoc's 'Edit PDF' tool, you can directly add text boxes, draw shapes, or insert images over your PDF. The process is executed client-side, ensuring instant responsiveness and optimal security.
content.6: No need to spend a fortune on heavy licenses. iLoveDoc provides you with all the essential tools for free and without constraints.
content.5_item0: Add clear annotations for your colleagues.
content.5_item1: Hide unnecessary parts of the text.
content.5_item2: Apply signatures or logos in just a few clicks.

reduire-taille-pdf-100ko.title: How to reduce a PDF size to less than 100 KB
reduire-taille-pdf-100ko.subtitle: Tips and solutions to compress your documents for administrative forms without degradation.
reduire-taille-pdf-100ko.description: Need to send a PDF under 100 KB? Use the Divide by size tool or our compressor to reduce your files without losing quality.

content.0: Many administrative and school portals impose a strict file size limit for uploads (often 100 KB or 200 KB). If your PDF is too heavy, don't panic, there are several simple methods.
content.2: The 'Compress PDF' tool from iLoveDoc analyzes the images and resources in your document and reduces their resolution without altering the readability of the text. This is the ideal method for keeping the entire file while significantly reducing its weight.
content.4: Sometimes, the document contains cover pages or appendices that are not required. By using the 'Remove pages' tool, you can lighten the file by only keeping the essential parts.
content.5: Thanks to our optimized tool suite, stay under the 100 KB limit and submit your files seamlessly on all administrative sites!

trois-methodes-editer-pdf.title: Three Methods to Edit a PDF
trois-methodes-editer-pdf.subtitle: Discover the method that best suits your needs.
trois-methodes-editer-pdf.description: Discover the best ways to edit a PDF with precision using online tools, from PDF conversion to modifying the original file content.

content.0: Editing a PDF can be approached in different ways depending on the desired outcome. Here are the three main methods to consider.
content.2: Ideal for filling out non-interactive forms, adding comments, or drawing on a plan. You can use iLoveDoc's online editor to write over existing elements.
content.4: If you need to rewrite entire paragraphs or modify the document structure, it's best to convert the PDF to Word. Once the changes are made in Word, you can re-export it as a PDF.
content.6: To lock in your changes and prevent others from editing the fields, apply a flattening to your modified file.
content.7: Choose the method that fits your workflow and gain efficiency in your daily tasks!

convertir-jpg-en-word.title: How to Convert a JPG to Editable Word
convertir-jpg-en-word.subtitle: Extract text from your images to make it editable in seconds.
convertir-jpg-en-word.description: Learn how to use iLoveDoc conversion tools to convert image files into editable Word documents.

content.0: Converting a JPG image containing text into an editable Word file (.docx) is essential if you want to reuse or correct scanned or photographed text.
content.2: This operation uses OCR (Optical Character Recognition). The algorithm analyzes the image pixels, identifies letter shapes, and converts them into digitally encoded text characters.
content.4: Simply upload your JPG file to the image conversion tool. Our tool extracts the textual content and generates a clean Word document that you can immediately open and edit in Word, LibreOffice, or Google Docs.
content.5: Save valuable time by avoiding manual retyping of your printed documents!

convertir-jpg-en-excel.title: Convert a JPG to Excel with these free tools
convertir-jpg-en-excel.subtitle: Retrieve tables from your digitized images directly in Excel format.
convertir-jpg-en-excel.description: This guide will show you how to use iLoveDoc tools to transform a JPG into an editable Excel spreadsheet.

content.0: Do you have a printed table or a screenshot of numerical data that you want to analyze in Excel? Manually re-typing the numbers is tedious and prone to errors. Here is the solution.
content.2: In addition to recognizing characters, the extraction algorithm identifies the table structure (borders, column separations, and headers) to faithfully reconstruct the calculation grid.
content.4: Drag and drop the image file onto our JPG to Excel conversion tool. The data grid is recreated and downloadable in .xlsx format. You can then apply your sum formulas, sorting, or graphs as usual.
content.5: Simplify your accounting and numerical data processing thanks to iLoveDoc's intelligent conversion!

reparer-pdf-corrompu.title: How to Repair a Corrupted or Damaged PDF File for Free?
reparer-pdf-corrompu.subtitle: Discover how to recover your unreadable PDF documents online.
reparer-pdf-corrompu.description: Is your PDF file refusing to open? Learn how to repair a corrupted PDF online for free and recover your data without risk.

content.0: There's nothing more frustrating than receiving an error message indicating that an important PDF document is corrupted and cannot be opened. Fortunately, there are free online solutions to restore your data.
content.1: Why does a PDF become unreadable?
content.2: An internet outage during download, a bug in your word processing system, or a transfer issue on a USB drive are the main causes of corruption. In most cases, the internal data of the document is intact, but the file header is damaged.
content.4: The iLoveDoc repair tool analyzes the binary structure of your damaged file and rebuilds the corrupted header in just a few seconds directly in your browser, ensuring absolute security.
content.5: Don't give up on your lost files! Use the free repair tool to regain access to your information instantly.

modifier-texte-pdf-gratuit.title: How to edit a PDF text for free and without software?
modifier-texte-pdf-gratuit.subtitle: Practical guide to editing the text of your PDF documents directly online.
modifier-texte-pdf-gratuit.description: Practical guide to editing your PDF text online for free. Modify, add or delete text without installing Adobe Acrobat Pro.

content.0: Editing text directly inside a PDF document is a frequent need, but office software like Acrobat Pro can be expensive. We show you how to get around this limitation.
content.1: The free online editor from iLoveDoc
content.2: Thanks to our online editing tool, you can write free text over the original document, mask confidential data using opaque rectangles, or insert images and logos.
content.4: If you need to rewrite entire paragraphs, it is recommended to first convert your PDF to Word format (.docx), make the changes in your preferred word processor, and then re-export it to PDF.
content.5: Modify your documents as needed by choosing the direct editing tool or Word conversion on iLoveDoc.

impression-pdf-caracteres-bizarres.title: Why Does My PDF Print with Strange Characters? (Solved)
impression-pdf-caracteres-bizarres.subtitle: Fixing Hieroglyphics, Symbols, and Font Bugs When Printing PDFs.
impression-pdf-caracteres-bizarres.description: Is your printer producing pages filled with strange symbols, hieroglyphics, or squares? Discover how to correct this PDF printing issue.

content.0: Sometimes, printing a PDF document can generate a string of incomprehensible symbols or white squares instead of the original letters. This problem is related to character fonts.
content.2: If the PDF creator did not embed the fonts in the file, your printer attempts to replace them. If it cannot find a match, it prints hieroglyphics.
content.3: The Universal Solution: Flattening or Printing as an Image
content.4: To resolve this bug, check the 'Print as Image' option in your viewer's settings, or pass the file through iLoveDoc's 'Flatten PDF' tool before printing.
content.5: By converting vector text into fixed geometric shapes (flattening), you ensure perfect printing on any printer model.

compresser-pdf-sans-perte.title: How to Compress a PDF Without Losing Quality for Email?
compresser-pdf-sans-perte.subtitle: Reduce the size of your PDF files while maintaining maximum clarity.
compresser-pdf-sans-perte.description: Reduce the size of your PDF files to send them by email without degrading readability. 100% free online compression tips.

content.0: Email inboxes often reject attachments over 10 or 20 MB. Compressing your PDF is essential to ensure delivery.
content.2: Our compression tool does not alter texts. It specifically targets embedded images by adjusting their resolution (DPI) and removes obsolete metadata accumulated during modifications.
content.3: What level of compression to choose?
content.4: We offer three modes: strong compression (for an ultra-light file), recommended compression (ideal balance), and light compression (maximum quality).
content.5: Compress your files locally in your browser while maintaining total control over the size/quality ratio.

copier-texte-pdf-scanne.title: How to Copy Text from a Scanned PDF or Image?
copier-texte-pdf-scanne.subtitle: Use Optical Character Recognition (OCR) to copy text.
copier-texte-pdf-scanne.description: Unable to select or copy text from a PDF? Learn how to convert a scanned PDF into editable text using free OCR.

content.0: If you're unable to highlight or copy text from a document, it's because it's just an image of a scanned document or a protection lock is preventing copying.
content.2: OCR (Optical Character Recognition) is a technology that visually scans the pixels of the PDF to extract words and transform them into indexable computer characters.
content.4: Upload your scan to our 'OCR PDF' tool. The algorithm runs locally to generate a new fully searchable PDF where you can copy and paste all paragraphs.
content.5: Convert your scans into dynamic working documents and save valuable time every day.

convertir-pdf-word-mise-en-page.title: Convert a PDF to Word without altering the layout
convertir-pdf-word-mise-en-page.subtitle: Conversion tips to avoid text and table shifts.
convertir-pdf-word-mise-en-page.description: Tired of shifted tables and misaligned text during your conversions? Here's how to convert a PDF to Word while keeping the original format.

content.0: Converting a PDF to Word sometimes results in overlapping lines of text or broken tables. This shift is due to the lack of fluid margin markers in the PDF format.
content.2: The iLoveDoc converter analyzes the visual topography of the original document and recreates a native Word paragraph and table grid structure to minimize manual retouching.
content.4: If you notice small discrepancies, use the tabulation rule instead of the space bar to align your text blocks, and ensure that images are properly anchored.
content.5: Local conversion on iLoveDoc provides you with a clean and immediately editable .docx document.

mot-de-passe-pdf-oublie.title: Lost PDF Password: How to Open a Locked PDF?
mot-de-passe-pdf-oublie.subtitle: Legal solutions and tools to unlock your protected PDF files.
mot-de-passe-pdf-oublie.description: Have you forgotten the password to your own PDF document? Discover how to unlock and remove PDF protection legally.

content.0: Encrypting a PDF is a good idea to secure it, but losing your own password blocks access to your official reports or personal documents.
content.2: For editing restrictions (owner password), our 'Unlock PDF' tool instantly removes the lock locally to restore your copying and printing rights.
content.3: What to do for an opening password (AES encryption)?
content.4: To open an encrypted document, the user key remains mandatory. Once entered for the first time on our secure platform, the tool removes it permanently for your subsequent readings.
content.5: Free your documents from repetitive input constraints thanks to secure unlocking.

bug-previsualisation-pdf-windows.title: Fixing the PDF Preview Pane Bug in Windows
bug-previsualisation-pdf-windows.subtitle: Restore PDF preview display in your File Explorer.
bug-previsualisation-pdf-windows.description: Is Windows Explorer no longer displaying a preview of your PDF files or showing an error? Here's how to quickly reactivate PDF preview.

content.0: The Windows Explorer preview pane is very useful for quickly viewing a document summary, but it often gets stuck or displays a black screen.
content.1: Why does the preview pane get stuck?
content.2: Installing or updating third-party viewers modifies system links (handlers). Windows then ends up with multiple conflicting engines to display the rendering.
content.3: How to fix the preview issue?
content.4: Open folder options, check that the 'Show preview handlers' box is checked, then reset your default reader in Windows settings.
content.5: A well-configured system streamlines your daily navigation through your professional directories.

signer-pdf-sans-imprimante.title: How to Fill and Sign a PDF Document Without a Printer?
signer-pdf-sans-imprimante.subtitle: Sign your documents and contracts electronically and for free.
signer-pdf-sans-imprimante.description: No need to print to sign! Discover how to fill out a form and add your signature to a PDF online for free in 2026.

content.0: Printing a contract, signing it by hand, and then scanning it to send it back is a waste of time, paper, and ink. Today, it's extremely easy to do it 100% digitally.
content.2: In France and Europe (eIDAS regulation), electronically applied signatures have the same legal value as traditional paper signatures for the vast majority of commercial acts.
content.3: Sign on iLoveDoc in a few clicks
content.4: Import the contract, draw your signature on the touch screen or upload a photo of it, and drag it to the agreement line. The final document is compiled securely without server transit.
content.5: Go paperless and simplify the signing of your professional quotes and contracts.

fusionner-pdf-sur-smartphone.title: How to merge and reorganize PDFs on your smartphone?
fusionner-pdf-sur-smartphone.subtitle: Combine and manage your PDF documents directly from your smartphone.
fusionner-pdf-sur-smartphone.description: Need to assemble PDFs from your phone? Discover how to combine, sort, and merge PDF files on iPhone and Android for free.

content.0: Assembling supporting documents or reports sometimes needs to be done urgently while on the move. Fortunately, your smartphone is more than sufficient.
content.2: No need to clutter your phone's storage space with paid applications. Access the iLoveDoc website from your mobile browser (Safari on iPhone, Chrome on Android).
content.4: Our reactive touch interface allows you to reorder pages by dragging them with your finger and compile PDFs instantly and 100% securely.
content.5: Manage all your document flows quickly, anywhere, directly from the palm of your hand.
